hero.sub: 150,000+ verified articles · No hallucination · Real article cited
paso1.desc: In your own words, no legal jargon. Apolo understands human language.
paso2.desc: Analyzes 150,000+ verified articles in real time. No fabrication, no shortcuts.
paso3.desc: Number, law and real text — the source you can verify. Nothing made up.
chat.placeholder: How can I help you today?
chat.hint: Select a country and legal area to begin
bifurcacion.label: Choose your path
puerta.ciudadano.desc: Describe your situation in your own words. Apolo consults the law and cites the exact article that protects you — no detours, no fabrication.
puerta.abogado.desc: Direct search by article, subject and jurisdiction. Multiple states in parallel. No intermediaries between you and the law.
indice.label: Research · B2G · Academia
indice.desc: 32 Civil Codes analyzed article by article. Constitutional inconsistencies, obsolete articles and divergences between states — with data, not opinion.
servicios.label: Apolo Engine · Products
srv.consulta.desc: Write your question in plain language. Apolo searches 150,000+ articles and cites the exact applicable rule — no fabrication, no detours.
srv.redactor.desc: Apolo asks you questions, finds the relevant articles and generates your contract with a real legal basis. Download in Word ready to sign.
srv.auditor.desc: Upload your PDF or Word contract. Apolo detects abusive clauses, imbalances and violations of applicable law in your state.
srv.panel.desc: Navigate the law by hierarchy, generate process diagrams with AI and consult Apolo in the context of the active article. Multi-state.
srv.indice.desc: 32 Civil Codes analyzed article by article. Normative quality ranking, constitutional risks and dead letter by state.
srv.vectorial.desc: Discover which articles are unique to your state, what Mexico's 32 codes share and where there are convergences with European law.
contratos.desc: Draft a new contract with a real legal basis, or analyze an existing one to detect risks and abusive clauses.
camino.a.desc: Choose the contract type, answer Apolo's questions and download your Word document ready to sign.
camino.b.titulo:
I have a contract
and want to review it
camino.b.desc: Upload your contract in PDF or Word. Apolo detects abusive clauses, imbalances and violations of applicable law in your state.
upload.label: Upload your contract
upload.titulo: Drag your contract here or click
upload.desc: PDF or DOCX · Maximum 10 MB · Best results with DOCX

marco.motor.que.desc: Always active. Describe your case and Apolo will identify the relevant articles across all available legislation.
marco.motor.como.desc: Optional. Select a specific law below and Apolo will read the relevant chapters in order, explaining the complete process from start to finish.
marco.motor.ley.label: Activate process analysis
marco.motor.ley.hint: Select a law so Apolo can explain the applicable procedure step by step.
marco.motor.ley.vacia: No specific process — only analyzes WHAT the law says
auditor.desc: Apolo identifies abusive clauses, legal risks and law violations — citing the exact article.
auditor.aviso: This analysis is indicative and does not replace review by a qualified lawyer. Tesseum cites real verified articles from the legislative corpus.
abogado.banner: Launch period · Free access until May 7
abogado.saludo: Hello. I am APOLO, your professional legal assistant. Select an article from the navigator to begin the analysis.
abogado.art.cargado: I've loaded {art}. You can ask me about its content, implications, or how to apply it in specific cases.

marco.desc: Describe your case. Apolo simultaneously analyzes what the law says and how the process works.
marco.placeholder: Describe your case in detail. Example: My client rented a commercial space in Guadalajara. The landlord cut off electricity and water to force them to vacate without any court process. Which articles protect them and how can they claim?

marco.sintesis.eyebrow: ✦ Legal Framework of the Case · Apolo
marco.como.label: ⟳ HOW the process works
